---
title: "Airbnb Zurich Project"
subtitle: "This project explores pricing, clustering, and machine learning techniques applied to Zurich Airbnb listings."
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: full
---
<iframe src="visuals/Airbnb-FinalPresentation_Send.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
